name: Unit Detail
description: Single unit details including specs, current tenant, lease info, rent history, maintenance, and documents.

view.description: Full unit detail view with specs, current tenant info, and tabbed rent and maintenance history

slots.header: Unit number, property name, status badge, edit

visual_brief: Detail view for a single rental unit. Header shows unit number/name, status badge (occupied, vacant, maintenance), and action buttons. A specs section displays key-value pairs: bedroom count, bathroom count, square footage, floor, rent amount. A tenant information card shows the current tenant (avatar, name, contact, lease dates) or 'Vacant' with a list-unit button. Tabbed content below shows: Rent History (payment records), Maintenance (ticket list), and Documents (lease, inspection reports). The view preset is the only preset, displaying all information.

responsive.mobile: Single-column stacked layout. Specs in a 2-column key-value grid. Tenant card full-width. Tabs become a dropdown or accordion.
responsive.tablet: Standard layout. Specs and tenant info side by side. Tabs in a row.
responsive.desktop: Full layout with specs, tenant card, and tabs all comfortably displayed.

composition.UnitDetail: Container(d-section, flex-col, gap-6) > [Header + Specs + CurrentTenant? + TabContent]
